ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currency_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency pair */,
  "currency_base" TEXT /* Base currency in the pair */,
  "currency_quote" TEXT /* Quote currency in the pair */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency pair */,
  "pair_description" TEXT /* Description of the currency pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the pair was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency pair */,
  "local_time" TEXT /* Local time of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the currency pair */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the currency pair during the time period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the currency pair during the time period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the currency pair */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades during the time period */,
  "trading_session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trader account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trader account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the trader's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader conducting the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss incurred during the session */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the trading session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency pair related to the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_start" TEXT /* Start time of the trend observation */,
  "trend_end" TEXT /* End time of the trend observation */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the trend analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency pair for prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price based on analytics */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (0-100) */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_used FOREIGN KEY ("model_used") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "currency_pair" TEXT /* Currency pair the report pertains to */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content/details of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_history" (
  "prediction_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction history entry */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who made the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price based on analytics */,
  "actual_price" REAL /* Actual price at the time of the prediction */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss incurred based on the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_history_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_history_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)
